words.def: a gully that is shallower than a ravine
words.zh: vi. 拉, 拖, 拔劍

words.def: a person who is under the protection or in the custody of another
words.zh: n. 病房, 守衛, 保衛, 保護, 監護, 牢房, 行政區, 鎖孔內的榫舌
n. 擦傷處, 半成品

words.def: the waging of armed conflict against an enemy
words.zh: n. 戰爭, 戰爭狀態, 戰術, 軍事, 衝突, 鬥爭, 競爭
